gigapan.description: We are moving the Global Connections Lab, which is where the original GigaPan was developed.  As a result there are boxes and piles and shelves filled with GigaPans and GigaPan components from all steps in the design process.  Everything on the table is a GigaPan, or a part of a GigaPan, or a GigaPan prototype.
